మొత్తం జాతీయ సగటు కంటే ఎక్కువ ఖర్చు చేసే, అత్యధిక సగటు నెలవారీ ఖర్చులు ఉన్న మొదటి 10 ముస్లిం గృహాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) > (SELECT AVG(MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION) ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    f.HOUSEHOLD_ID,
    f.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS
FROM 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION f
JOIN 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL s ON f.HOUSEHOLD_ID = s.HOUSEHOLD_ID
WHERE 
    s.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim'

        SELECT AVG(MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) 
        FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION
    )
ORDER BY 
    f.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: సామాజిక నెట్వర్క్ సంపర్కాల రకాలు మరియు మతపరమైన లేదా కుల సమూహాల ఆధారంగా వర్గీకరించబడిన, సగటు నెలవారీ గృహ ఖర్చుల వివరణ మరియు మొత్తం గృహాల సంఖ్యను అత్యధిక ఖర్చు నుండి అత్యల్ప ఖర్చు వరకు క్రమబద్ధీకరించి అందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS), COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    s.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE,
    s.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY,
    AVG(fc.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS avg_expenditure,
    COUNT(fc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) AS total_households
FROM 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL s
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION fc ON s.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fc.HOUSEHOLD_ID
GROUP BY 
    s.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE,
    s.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY
ORDER BY 
    avg_expenditure DESC;

FROM

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE, 
    g.DISTRICT_CODE, 
    AVG(f.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) AS avg_per_capita
FROM 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION f
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
